arts.ttl: Venezia vs. Roma, a lunchtime game kick off
arts.sum: Roma have scored the joint-most goals from penalties in Serie A this season (six, level with Inter - before the postponed match against Fiorentina. The last four matches between Venezia and Roma in Serie A have been balanced in terms of victories (one win each, two draws) and goals (7 each); the Giallorossi had won six of their previous seven matches against the Lagunari in the top flight (L1).
